_comment: Scraper runs at 22:00 UTC daily. That's 23:00 BST in summer (UK on UTC+1) and 22:00 GMT in winter (UK on UTC+0) — either way, 1–2 hours before the Europe/London midnight at which every game mode resets. This guarantees today's snapshot is already in the DB before the UK day rolls over. Cron schedules on Vercel are always UTC; named timezones aren't supported, so UTC timing is picked specifically because it sits on the right side of both DST transitions.
